variant.name: WithContextNoText
variant.summary: recorded when a query is submitted with context but no typed text

variant.name: WithNonTabContext
variant.summary: recorded when a query is submitted with non-tab context

variant.name: WithoutContext
variant.summary: recorded when a query is submitted without context

variant.name: WithTabContext
variant.summary: recorded when a query is submitted with tab context

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ActiveTabsCountOnContextMenuOpen.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of active tabs a user has at the time in which they open the composeboxcontext menu. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.AddedTabContextRecencyRanking.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the relative recency ranking (0-indexed) of a tab across its window when a tab is added as context through the composebox context menu. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.AiModeButtonClick.{ContextualSearchAiModeButtonSurface}
histogram.summary: Recorded when the AI mode button is clicked on the {ContextualSearchAiModeButtonSurface}. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ConfigParseSuccess.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded the first time the contextual search box is accessed and the configuration proto feature parameter is set to a non-empty value. This metric records whether the config proto was successfully parsed from the base64-encoded string.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ContextAdded.ContextAddedMethod.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of times a context addition method was used. Recorded once every time a file or files are added using a certain context addition method. i.e. Recorded once for copy and paste, drag and drop, context menu add, etc.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ContextMenuEntry.Clicked.{ContextualSearchSource}
ContextualSearch.DuplicateTabTitlesShownCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded during each session and records the number of tabs shown in the context menu UI that have duplicate titles.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Entrypoint.{Result}
histogram.summary: Records the entrypoint used when a session ended in {Result}. Recorded at the end of the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ErrorPageShown.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when the error page is shown, with the reason it was shown.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.File.Size.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The size of the file received by the browser from the WebUI. Recorded as soon as the browser receives it.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.File.Size.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The aggregate size of all file types received by the browser from the WebUI. Recorded as soon as the browser receives it.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.File.WebUI.UploadAttemptFailure.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records the validation error hit on the WebUI side when a file is uploaded. If no error occurred, this is logged as "No error." Recorded when a file upload is attempted.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Models.ModeOnSubmission.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks what model the user was using when they submitted the query. This metric is recorded only once the user has submitted the query and navigated to AIM.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Models.Shown.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when an AIM model is shown in the composebox menu.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Models.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the active model selected in the composebox. Recorded when the user switches to a model.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.FileCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Number of files included in a completed query. May be zero in the case that the input was only text. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs. Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.FileCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Number of files included in a completed query. May be zero in the case that the input was only text. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.Modality.V2.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records the combination of input types used to form the query. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs. Sliced by the funnel that initiated the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.Modality.V2.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records the combination of input types used to form the query. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.TextLength.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Number of characters in the composebox submission request. May be zero in the case that only a file was uploaded. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs. Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.TextLength.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Number of characters in the composebox submission request. May be zero in the case that only a file was uploaded. Recorded after navigation to the AIM page occurs.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Query.Time.ToSubmission.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the duration from composebox session start time to the time a query was submitted. Recorded as soon as the query is submitted, but before navigation. Note: A session starts when the compose button is clicked and the composebox shown. There may be multiple query submission times recorded per composebox shown.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.Duration.Total.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Contextual search session durations from when the session started to its abandonment or completion. A session starts when the compose button is clicked and the composebox shown. Completion is when the following happens: 1) user submits a query 2) user is redirected to the AIM page 3) the composebox is closed. Abandonment is when a user closes the composebox or closes the NTP without query submission. Recorded at the end of the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.Duration.{Status}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the duration of composebox sessions from start time to the end of the session. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: A session starts when the compose button is clicked and the composebox shown. A composebox session ends 1) when it is abandoned 2) a query is submitted and the composebox is closed. A session can be abandoned by the user closing the composebox or by exiting out of the NTP while the composebox is open without having submitted a query.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadAttemptCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of times the browser attempted to process {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by the funnel that initiated the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadAttemptCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The aggregated number of times the browser attempted to process all file types. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadAttemptCount.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of times the browser attempted to process {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadAttemptCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The aggregated number of times the browser attempted to process all file types. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadFailureCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of failures for {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. This does not include files that failed browser validation. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadFailureCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of failures aggregated across all file types within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. This does not include files that failed browser validation. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadFailureCount.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of failures for {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. This does not include files that failed browser validation. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadFailureCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of failures aggregated across all file types within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. This does not include files that failed browser validation. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadSuccessCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of successful file upload attempts to the Lens server for {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by the funnel that initiated the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadSuccessCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The total number of successful file upload attempts to the Lens server aggregated for all file types within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check). Sliced by the funnel that initiated the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadSuccessCount.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The number of successful file upload attempts to the Lens server for {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.UploadSuccessCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The total number of successful file upload attempts to the Lens server aggregated for all file types within the session. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.ValidationFailureCount.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ErrorType}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The total number of {ContextualSearchFileTypes} files that failed validation with the error {ErrorType}. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.Browser.ValidationFailureCount.{ErrorType}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: The aggregated number across all file types that failed validation with the error {ErrorType}. Recorded at the end of the session. Note: Only recorded for files that the WebUI approved for file upload (e.g., they passed the file size check).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.File.DeletedCount.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{FileState}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Count the file deletions from the composebox. This is recorded when a file is uploaded and then deleted from the composebox. Every deletion emits true if it was successful and false if it was not.

variant.name: ProcessingSuggestSignalsReady
variant.summary: File upload processing and suggest signals ready

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.QueryCount.FunnelMetrics.{ContextualSearchFunnel}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the number of queries submitted per session. Multiple queries may be submitted when the AIM page is opened in a new tab or window and the composebox remains open. Recorded at the end of the session. Sliced by applicable funnels for the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.QueryCount.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the number of queries submitted per session. Multiple queries may be submitted when the AIM page is opened in a new tab or window and the composebox remains open. Recorded at the end of the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Session.QuerySubmittedWithoutSessionStart.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks queries that were submitted without calling session start. This should never happen. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.SessionEnd.NavigationResult.{ContextualSearchFileTypes}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: When a session ends either by successful navigation to the response (True) or abandonment (False), this metric logs the result for the file state associated with {ContextualSearchFileTypes} that was present in the compose context.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.SessionEnd.{Result}.ModelMode.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records the active model mode used when a composebox session ended in {Result}. Recorded at the end of the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.SessionEnd.{Result}.ToolMode.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records the active tool mode used when a composebox session ended in {Result}. Recorded at the end of the session.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.TabContextAdded.V2.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of times a tab is added as context through the composebox context menu. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.TabContextAddedFromPlusButton.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of times a tab is added as context through the plus button in the composebox context menu. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.TabContextAddedFromTabSuggestionChip.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of times a tab is added as context through the tab suggestion chip in the composebox. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.TabWithDuplicateTitleClicked.V2.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the total number of times a tab with a duplicate title is clicked through the composebox context menu. This metric is recorded regardless of whether or not a query was issued with the tab.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Tools.ModeOnSubmission.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks what tool mode the user was in when they submitted the query. This metric is recorded only once the user has submitted the query and navigated to AIM.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Tools.Shown.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when an AIM tool is shown in the composebox menu.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.Tools.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Tracks the active tool selected in the composebox. Recorded when the user switches to a tool.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.TypedSuggestNavigation.IsVerbatim.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when a user navigates to a suggestion in typed mode from {ContextualSearchSource}. Logs true if the suggestion was verbatim, and false otherwise (SearchSuggest).

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.UserAction.DeleteAutoSuggestedTab.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records every time the user deletes the auto-suggested tab context chip from the composebox. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.UserAction.InputStateDeletion.{ContextualSearchInputStateDeletionType}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Records every time the user deletes a {ContextualSearchInputStateDeletionType} from the composebox. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.UserAction.SubmitQueryV2.{ContextualSearchContextState}.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when a query is submitted {ContextualSearchContextState} from {ContextualSearchSource}. Always recorded as true. Note that more than one entry can be submitted per query submission if it overlaps with WithContextNoText.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.UserAction.SubmitVoiceQuery.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when a query is submitted through a voice query from {ContextualSearchSource}. Always recorded as true.

histogram.name: ContextualSearch.ZeroSuggestClick.IsContextual.{ContextualSearchSource}
histogram.summary: Recorded when a user clicks on a suggestion in zero-suggest mode from {ContextualSearchSource}. Logs true if the suggestion was contextual, and false otherwise.
